abstract: Complete brand identity system creation from discovery through all touchpoints: web, social, advertising, print. Seven-phase workflow: Discovery (brand audit + competitive research via brand-research), Strategy (personality + voice + positioning via aesthetic-direction), Visual Identity (logo system + color system via color-system + typography via typography-pairing), Digital (web guidelines via design-system-generator + bento-layout + component-patterns), Social (platform templates via social-media-design), Advertising (ad creative specs via ad-creative-design), Print (collateral standards via print-design). Output: comprehensive 80-100 page Brand Guidelines document including mission/values, logo usage rules, color/type systems (RGB + CMYK), web component library, social media templates per platform, ad platform specifications, print collateral (business cards, letterhead, signage, packaging), and do's/don'ts visual examples. Master orchestration skill integrating 8+ companion skills.
